seoTitle: Arrawarra vs Artarmon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Arrawarra and Artarmon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Arrawarra and Artarmon.
heading: Arrawarra vs Artarmon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arrawarra, New South Wales and Artarmon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arrawarra has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Artarmon (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arrawarra or Artarmon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arrawarra has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Artarmon scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arrawarra scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Artarmon scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arrawarra or Artarmon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arrawarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
